footer.tagline: Stay up to date with your favorite podcasts.

landing.subtitle: Get daily personalized newsletters for your favorite podcasts
landing.feature1Description: Subscribe to your favorite podcasts via RSS feed
landing.feature2Description: Automatically generated summaries of new episodes
landing.feature3Description: Receive all summaries at your preferred time

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to manage your podcast newsletters
auth.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address first
auth.registerDescription: Join the waitlist and be among the first to access Castletter
auth.waitlistDescription: We'll get in touch once you've been approved
auth.waitlistMessage: We've received your request. Once we activate your beta access, you'll receive an email with your invitation link.
auth.waitlistShareNote: In the meantime, we'd love it if you spread the word about Castletter.
auth.verifyErrorDescription: There was a problem verifying your email
auth.verifySuccessDescription: Your account has been successfully activated
auth.verifySuccessMessage: You'll be automatically redirected to your settings...
auth.verifyPendingMessage: Please click on the link in the email we sent you to activate your account.
auth.verifySpamNote: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.settingsDescription: Configure newsletter email and delivery time
dashboard.archiveDescription: View and read all sent newsletters
dashboard.welcomeCardDescription: Get daily personalized newsletters for your favorite podcasts
dashboard.nextStep3: Receive daily newsletters with podcast summaries

settings.title: Settings
settings.cardDescription: Set where and when your daily newsletters are sent
settings.emailHint: Your daily newsletters will be sent to this address
settings.infoBullet1: • Your newsletters are sent daily at the chosen time
settings.infoBullet2: • You can use a different email address than your login email
settings.infoBullet3: • The delivery time is automatically converted to your local timezone
settings.infoBullet4: • Changes take effect with the next newsletter
settings.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

subscriptions.title: Podcast Subscriptions
subscriptions.addPodcastDescription: Paste the RSS feed URL of your favorite podcast
subscriptions.noPodcasts: You haven't subscribed to any podcasts yet
subscriptions.emptyStateTitle: You haven't subscribed to any podcasts yet
subscriptions.emptyStateHint: Add your first podcast above using the RSS feed URL!
subscriptions.deleteDescription: Do you really want to remove «{title}»? You will no longer receive newsletter summaries for this podcast.

archive.title: Newsletter Archive
archive.description: All your sent newsletters at a glance
archive.emptyHintFiltered: Choose a different podcast from the filter.
archive.emptyHintAll: Once Castletter sends your first newsletter, it will appear here.
archive.contentLoadError: The newsletter content could not be loaded.

email.subject: Your new podcast updates
email.greetingBody: here are your new podcast summaries:
email.plainTextGreeting:
Hello,
here are your new podcast summaries:
